name: goodbye-google
description: John Thomas's Goodbye Google — a practical step-by-step guide to reclaiming your privacy and data by leaving Google services, particularly Gmail.
useCase: Understanding privacy risks, migrating from Gmail, replacing Google services, reducing tracking, deleting your Google account.
knownRisks: Some services will not work without a Google account (Android, YouTube, etc.)
The book was published in 2017 — some services and procedures may have changed
Migration is time-consuming — budget 2-4 weeks minimum
